phase_name: Phase AV — CC-OSS Gap Closure (6 items, 3 waves)

baseline.notes: All 6 CC-OSS gap closure items implemented across 3 waves. 33 new tests all passing.

implementation_summary.T1: harness.rs parallel path partitions tools by is_concurrency_safe(): safe→parallel, unsafe→serial, results merged in original order
implementation_summary.T2: Anthropic API system prompt split into cached static + dynamic blocks with cache_control ephemeral. anthropic-beta header added. PromptParts.merge() uses ---DYNAMIC--- separator
implementation_summary.T3: CompactionPipeline::auto_snip() truncation method + AgentMessage::CompactHistory + /compact command + Ctrl+K shortcut in TUI
implementation_summary.T4: RetryPolicy::unattended() with infinite retry for transient errors, 5-min max backoff. Auth/Billing fail immediately
implementation_summary.T5: coordinator.rs module with CoordinatorConfig + orchestration prompt. AgentManifest gains coordinator + worker_allowed_tools fields
implementation_summary.T6: StreamingToolExecutor dispatches safe tools during API streaming. Infrastructure wired into consume_stream. Gated behind enable_streaming_execution flag
